past_challenges.raw: Walking into a club meeting for the first time as someone with social anxiety felt paralyzing. My heart was racing and I almost turned around at the door. I ended up standing awkwardly in the corner for most of the first meeting.

Making friends felt impossible to me because I was so afraid of saying the wrong thing or coming across as weird. I had to consciously push myself to start small conversations and remind myself that most people are also nervous meeting new people.
